upstream_request.scope: Request that the published fxhash crate ship its declared Apache-2.0 and MIT license texts.

icu_mapping.payload_expression: Unicode-3.0 AND Unicode-DFS-2016 AND BSD-2-Clause AND BSD-3-Clause AND NAIST-2003 AND LicenseRef-Fedora-Public-Domain
icu_mapping.reason: The crate payload is byte-identical to Chromium ICU common/icudtl.dat at the pinned commit. The matching ICU license text is installed; the binary payload remains comparison-only because it is already present in the vendored crate source.

unresolved.reason: Published crate omits usable license text; newer 0.12.0 archive includes LICENSE-MIT but is not this selected dependency.
